## Summary

Please describe what changed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Design/style update
- [ ] New page/section
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Performance/accessibility improvement
- [ ] CI/CD or project setup

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build`
- [ ] I checked desktop layout
- [ ] I checked mobile layout
- [ ] I checked dark/light mode
- [ ] I verified links/buttons
- [ ] I did not add confidential client information
